title: Vestigate
description: View all the items added by datapacks (or mods) and their recipes
body:
# Vestigate
Like investigate, but archaic apprently.

![Vestigate video](https://i.ibb.co/tY5csNc/vestigate-video.gif)

## What does it do?
Vestigate adds one command `/vestigate` which can either be used on its own to see all datapacks/mods that add recipes (these appear in chat and can then be clicked to run the next command) or can be ran as `/vestigate packId` to see all the items added by that pack with respect to the recipes it adds. If you have [Polydex](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydex) installed, when you click on an item it will then show you the recipe in polydex.

## Why?
Datapacks have come very far since the beginning and recently I was playing through [The Bracken Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-bracken-pack) and found that it adds a lot of things that are not currently documented; of course, documentation takes time, so I thought I would construct a serverside mod that allows players to see all a pack has to offer, by utilising the recipes they add to show what they then create
